title: Bound Entanglement
description: Discover the mysterious phenomenon of bound entanglement - states that are entangled but cannot be distilled. Understand PPT entangled states, their construction, and why they challenge our understanding of entanglement.
learningObjectives: Define bound entanglement and explain why it exists
Construct examples of PPT entangled states
Understand the connection between NPT and distillability
Analyze the Horodecki family of bound entangled states
Explore open problems in bound entanglement research
